description: Composition:Black cut out sandals made of PU with coloured ankle straps  shoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustThese black cut out flats from catwalk, with coloured ankle straps, are a great way to make a funky statement. Team these up with shorts, capris or simple dresses for a real cool, laid back look. The PU heels make them a comfortable wear, while you go all out painting the town in your shades of colour.
